run_summary.summary: One active deal to report 💼 — SOJOS Vision (sunglasses) reached full close! A 23-message negotiation thread that started March 26 wrapped up yesterday when Liz signed the contract. The deal landed at $2,250 for 2 IG Reels. Content requirements are clear, Reel 1 draft is due 4/23, and Liz said she'd start filming early next week. Created the card in Content stage so it shows up on the board.

suggestions.message: Reel 1 draft is due to Ruby by 4/23 — that's this Wednesday. Key requirements: 15+ sec video, close-up shots ≥ half the video, tag @sojosvision, use #sojos #amazonsunglasses, include 10% off code MISSLIZSOJOS in caption. Ruby reviews within 24 hours before posting.

The second reel is on a flexible timeline — June 4 if Liz gets the Amazon Influencer Event invite, otherwise during Prime Day. Worth noting that June 4 is coming up fast if she's attending. No reposting rights granted to SOJOS.

deals.next_action: Film Reel 1 and submit draft to Ruby for approval by 4/23
deals.notes:
[Apr 17]: Liz signed updated contract and confirmed she'll start content early next week. Contract revised to set Reel 1 draft due 4/23 (original clause requiring draft within 1 week of receiving sunglasses was ambiguous — Kenny negotiated this fixed date with Ruby).
[Apr 15]: Ruby sent contract. Kenny replied asking to remove/clarify the "1 week after receiving sunglasses" draft clause since timing was unclear. Asked for 4/23 for Reel 1, May for Reel 2.
[Apr 14]: Liz confirmed sunglasses received. Requested signed agreement from Ruby before filming.
[Apr 7]: Ruby shipped all 4 pairs. Content requirements: video ≥15 sec, close-up shots of sunglasses being worn ≥ half the video, caption must tag @sojosvision, include #sojos and #amazonsunglasses, and discount code MISSLIZSOJOS (10% off). Must send draft to Ruby for approval before posting — 24hr turnaround. Canva brief shared.
[Apr 3]: Both sides agreed on $2,250 for 2 IG Reels — no reposting rights. Reel 1 to post in April; Reel 2 on June 4 if Amazon event, otherwise during Prime Day. Liz selected 4 sunglass styles and confirmed shipping to 2241 Bird Ln, Batavia IL 60510.
[Mar 26–Apr 2]: Negotiation recap — SOJOS initially offered gifted collab (Liz declined). They came back with $800 + 10% commission (Liz declined, countered $2000 + $500/mo usage). SOJOS offered $2,000 for 2 reels; Liz countered $2,250. SOJOS accepted.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Contract signed by Liz — deal created in Content stage. $2,250 for 2 IG Reels (SOJOS sunglasses). Reel 1 draft due 4/23. Discount code: MISSLIZSOJOS (10% off). No reposting rights.
